patterns_recognized: Full-slate PENDING_SP_DATA: all 14 games lacked scored SPs at pipeline run time — protocol validated 7+ times in archive. No directional picks issued without quantitative model scores.
'PLATINUM tier WITHHELD (SP edge against pick)' in grade_reasons is a mandatory GOLD cap per 05-16 BOS@ATL process failure — do not re-confirm PLATINUM when model engine explicitly withheld it.
Pick-column parsing risk on same-city abbreviations (CHC vs CHW, 05-16 error): always quote the raw CSV pick column value directly before constructing any reasoning.
Live API confirms all 14 SPs are now announced; JR Ritchie (ATL) and Tatsuya Imai (HOU) flagged as probable thin-Statcast arms likely to remain PENDING_SP_DATA on next pipeline re-run.

CLE @ DET.reasoning: Live API shows Slade Cecconi (CLE away) vs Framber Valdez (DET home). Valdez is an established arm with deep Statcast history; Cecconi has MLB tenure. Both should cross the 100-pitch Statcast threshold on pipeline re-run. CLE is 26-22, DET is 20-27. No directional claim without quantitative model output — PENDING confirmed.

BAL @ TB.reasoning: Live API shows Trevor Rogers (BAL away) vs Shane McClanahan (TB home). McClanahan is elite with deep Statcast history; Rogers has MLB tenure. TB is 30-15 — strong home record. When model scores, expect McClanahan's SP edge to be a significant F1 input. No directional pick without quantitative grades.

CIN @ PHI.reasoning: Live API shows Nick Lodolo (CIN away) vs Andrew Painter (PHI home). Both teams are 24-23. Lodolo is established; Painter is a developing PHI arm whose Statcast sample may be adequate. Should score on re-run. No directional call without model output.

ATL @ MIA.reasoning: Live API shows JR Ritchie (ATL away) vs Max Meyer (MIA home). Ritchie appears to be a recently-promoted arm — flag as thin-Statcast risk; may remain PENDING on re-run (Heuristic 3: rookie SP blindspot). ATL is 32-15 with a potent lineup. Meyer is more established. Caution warranted on Ritchie sample adequacy when model re-runs.

NYM @ WSH.reasoning: Live API shows Christian Scott (NYM away) vs Jake Irvin (WSH home). WSH is 23-24; NYM is 20-26. Irvin has MLB tenure; Scott is a younger NYM arm. Both should have scoreable Statcast data on re-run. No directional pick without quantitative model output.

BOS is 19-27, KC is 20-27; two sub-.500 teams where SP quality differential will be the key edge input. No directional pick without model output.

HOU @ MIN.reasoning: Live API shows Tatsuya Imai (HOU away) vs Kendry Rojas (MIN home). Imai appears to be a Japanese import likely in his first MLB season — high thin-Statcast risk, may remain PENDING on re-run per HARD CAP 5 small-sample quarantine. HOU is 19-29, struggling significantly. Flag for likely continued PENDING due to Imai's probable limited MLB Statcast sample.

MIL @ CHC.reasoning: Live API shows Brandon Sproat (MIL away) vs Shota Imanaga (CHC home). Imanaga is elite with strong Statcast data; Sproat is a newer arm with uncertain sample size. CHC is 29-18, MIL is 26-18 — top NL Central teams. Imanaga's SP edge will be a key F1 input when model scores. No directional call without quantitative output.

TEX @ COL.reasoning: Live API shows MacKenzie Gore (TEX away) vs Jose Quintana (COL home). Coors Field game — per 05-15 archive, extreme f5_full_delta > 0.35 at Coors is a park artifact and must not trigger OVERRIDE. Both SPs are experienced with substantial Statcast data. Park inflation must be applied when model scores. No directional pick without output.
lessons_applied: Coors park f5_full_delta inflation suppression (05-15 archive)
